# selectionAccessory

**Interface Property**

The accessory that displays place information when a person selects a place.

## Declaration

```swift
selectionAccessory?: PlaceSelectionAccessory | null;
```

## Discussion

Use this property to initialize an annotation with an instance of a [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/AnnotationConstructorOptions/place] so that the accessory displays the correct place.
title: selectionAccessory
